title: Hand-rolled JSON scanner in core: correct and must not be replaced with serde_json
description: The json_extract_string_field scanner is allocation-minimal by design: only the target field's value is allocated, all other field values are skipped without copying. serde_json allocates every field value into a plain String, leaving other secrets in unzeroized heap memory after drop. The comment in-source correctly documents this. A contributor who suggests 'just use serde_json, it's simpler' should be pointed to the comment. Do NOT replace.
